# zs-docs
> ZarishSphere Foundation — master documentation repository
> Single source of truth for governance, architecture, and platform documentation.
> URL: https://github.com/zarishsphere/zs-docs

## Navigation

- [INDEX.md](INDEX.md): Root index with navigation routes for all 10 folders
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): AI agent working memory — reading order, ZUSS rules, conventions

## Essentials (read first)

- [001-zarishsphere-constitution.md](001-meta/001-zarishsphere-constitution.md): Supreme governing document — 12 laws, 4 tiers
- [005-ecosystem-architecture.md](001-meta/005-ecosystem-architecture.md): Master repository map, entity relationships, folder architecture
- [004-writing-rules.md](001-meta/004-writing-rules.md): ZUSS naming and formatting standard (non-negotiable)
- [006-glossary.md](001-meta/006-glossary.md): Canonical definitions for all ZarishSphere terms
- [007-agent-ecosystem-strategy.md](001-meta/007-agent-ecosystem-strategy.md): AI agent, MCP, and skills strategy

## Foundation and governance (001-meta/)

- [001-zarishsphere-constitution.md](001-meta/001-zarishsphere-constitution.md): The supreme governing document of the ZarishSphere ecosystem.
- [002-zarishsphere-profile.md](001-meta/002-zarishsphere-profile.md): Complete institutional profile of the ZarishSphere Foundation — a universal, zero-cost, no-coder-friendly ecosystem that indexes every global standard across every domain of human civilization and makes them executable as apps, forms, workflows, and services through a platform-of-platforms architecture.
- [003-founder-profile.md](001-meta/003-founder-profile.md): Complete context profile of Mohammad Ariful Islam, founder and sole builder of the ZarishSphere Foundation.
- [004-writing-rules.md](001-meta/004-writing-rules.md): ZarishSphere Universal Serialization Standard (ZUSS) — the single, consistent rule set governing how every file, folder, repository, workflow, identifier, and document is named, structured, and written within the ZarishSphere ecosystem.
- [005-ecosystem-architecture.md](001-meta/005-ecosystem-architecture.md): Complete master map of the ZarishSphere ecosystem — all components, repos, folder structures, entity relationships, subdomain architecture, and navigation rules for the entire platform-of-platforms ecosystem.
- [006-glossary.md](001-meta/006-glossary.md): Canonical definitions for every term, identifier, acronym, and concept used in the ZarishSphere ecosystem — from the Foundation and Constitution through ZARISH-INDEX, ZARISH-STANDARDS, Platform, Console, Marketplace, Builder, Apps, SDK, and all other ecosystem components.
- [007-agent-ecosystem-strategy.md](001-meta/007-agent-ecosystem-strategy.md): Strategic blueprint for making the entire ZarishSphere ecosystem agent-native and MCP-consumable.

## Foundation governance (002-foundation/)

- [001-foundation-charter.md](002-foundation/001-foundation-charter.md): Founding charter of the ZarishSphere Foundation.
- [002-governance-model.md](002-foundation/002-governance-model.md): Defines how the ZarishSphere Foundation makes decisions.
- [003-licensing-policy.md](002-foundation/003-licensing-policy.md): Defines the dual-licensing policy for all ZarishSphere ecosystem outputs: Apache 2.
- [004-contributor-guidelines.md](002-foundation/004-contributor-guidelines.md): Defines how anyone can contribute to any ZarishSphere project.
- [005-country-adoption-model.md](002-foundation/005-country-adoption-model.md): Country Adoption Maturity Model (CAMM) defining the structured pathway from first contact to full digital health sovereignty.

## Platform architecture (003-platform/)

- [001-platform-overview.md](003-platform/001-platform-overview.md): Technical overview of the ZarishSphere Platform — a modular, Plane 0-compatible, Go-native platform-of-platforms for executing indexed global standards as digital services.
- [002-module-architecture.md](003-platform/002-module-architecture.md): Defines the module architecture for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [003-deployment-planes.md](003-platform/003-deployment-planes.md): Detailed specifications for all five deployment planes: air-gapped (0), edge/RPi (1), district server (2), national cloud (3), and global SaaS (4).
- [004-g2a-engine.md](003-platform/004-g2a-engine.md): Specification for the Guideline-to-Action (G2A) Engine — the core innovation of the ZarishSphere ecosystem.
- [005-fhir-architecture.md](003-platform/005-fhir-architecture.md): FHIR R5 integration architecture for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [006-api-design.md](003-platform/006-api-design.md): API design principles and contracts for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [007-data-model.md](003-platform/007-data-model.md): Core data entities and identifier patterns for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [008-domain-registry.md](003-platform/008-domain-registry.md): The complete 40-domain classification taxonomy for the ZarishSphere ecosystem.
- [009-repository-catalog.md](003-platform/009-repository-catalog.md): Authoritative reference catalog of all ZarishSphere repositories across the entire ecosystem.
- [010-free-tier-resource-map.md](003-platform/010-free-tier-resource-map.md): Complete map of every zero-cost and free-tier resource available for deploying the ZarishSphere Platform.

## ZARISH-INDEX (004-zarish-index/)

- [001-zarish-index-overview.md](004-zarish-index/001-zarish-index-overview.md): Project charter and platform-level view of ZARISH-INDEX — the first free, open-source, machine-readable unified index of every global standard, framework, treaty, guideline, and technical specification across all domains of human civilization.
- [002-domain-taxonomy-40.md](004-zarish-index/002-domain-taxonomy-40.md): Complete 40-domain master taxonomy for the ZARISH-INDEX.
- [003-metadata-schema.md](004-zarish-index/003-metadata-schema.md): Data schema for ZARISH-INDEX entries.
- [004-harvesting-policy.md](004-zarish-index/004-harvesting-policy.md): Strategic direction and harvesting policy for ZARISH-INDEX — an autonomous open research project maintaining the most complete freely accessible machine-readable index of global standards.
- [005-zarish-index-to-platform.md](004-zarish-index/005-zarish-index-to-platform.md): Integration architecture connecting ZARISH-INDEX to the ZarishSphere Platform.

## ZARISH-STANDARDS (005-zarish-standards/)

- [001-zarish-standards-overview.md](005-zarish-standards/001-zarish-standards-overview.md): Strategic direction for ZARISH-STANDARDS — ZarishSphere's curated, implementation-focused registry of every international, regional, national, and humanitarian standard the platform enforces, implements, or references.
- [002-transformation-model.md](005-zarish-standards/002-transformation-model.md): Data mapping and structural transformation model that converts ZARISH-INDEX entries into ZARISH-STANDARDS executable definitions.
- [003-standards-schema.md](005-zarish-standards/003-standards-schema.md): Validation pipeline machine-readable schemas for ZARISH-STANDARDS.
- [004-standards-to-platform-pipeline.md](005-zarish-standards/004-standards-to-platform-pipeline.md): Real-time standards enforcement pipeline connecting ZARISH-STANDARDS to the ZarishSphere Platform G2A Engine.
- [005-fhir-r5-conventions.md](005-zarish-standards/005-fhir-r5-conventions.md): Defines FHIR R5 resource-level conventions for all ZarishSphere platform services — resource ID format, tenant isolation, required metadata, audit event generation, search response bundles, and error response format.
- [006-fhir-profiling-policy.md](005-zarish-standards/006-fhir-profiling-policy.md): Defines when and how FHIR profiles (StructureDefinitions) are created, authored, named, and validated for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [007-fhir-search-standards.md](005-zarish-standards/007-fhir-search-standards.md): Defines the required and optional FHIR search parameters, pagination rules, search modifiers, chaining, and performance requirements for all ZarishSphere Platform FHIR endpoints.
- [008-fhir-audit-policy.md](005-zarish-standards/008-fhir-audit-policy.md): Defines mandatory AuditEvent generation, structure, retention, and review procedures for all FHIR operations in the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [009-fhir-r4-bridge-policy.md](005-zarish-standards/009-fhir-r4-bridge-policy.md): Defines when and how FHIR R4↔R5 bidirectional translation is used for partner system integration, including translation rules, lossy operations, and testing requirements.
- [010-api-rest-design-guide.md](005-zarish-standards/010-api-rest-design-guide.md): Defines REST API design conventions for all ZarishSphere Platform services — URL structure, versioning, pagination, error responses, headers, and rate limiting.
- [011-api-openapi-conventions.md](005-zarish-standards/011-api-openapi-conventions.md): Defines OpenAPI 3.
- [012-api-asyncapi-conventions.md](005-zarish-standards/012-api-asyncapi-conventions.md): Defines AsyncAPI 3.
- [013-form-schema-specification.md](005-zarish-standards/013-form-schema-specification.md): Defines the ZS Form Schema v1 specification — the standard for all domain forms in the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [014-form-validation-rules.md](005-zarish-standards/014-form-validation-rules.md): Defines automated validation rules for all domain forms in the ZarishSphere Platform — JSON Schema validation, FHIR mapping completeness, terminology code existence, translation key checks, and PII prohibition.
- [015-i18n-key-conventions.md](005-zarish-standards/015-i18n-key-conventions.md): Defines internationalization key naming conventions for all ZarishSphere Platform forms and UI components — key hierarchy, locale file structure, supported locales, translation workflow, and fallback strategy.
- [016-terminology-governance.md](005-zarish-standards/016-terminology-governance.md): Defines terminology governance for the ZarishSphere Platform — approved code systems, coding requirements by domain, update schedules, caching strategy, and deprecation policy.
- [017-terminology-code-systems.md](005-zarish-standards/017-terminology-code-systems.md): Documents all supported terminology code systems in the ZarishSphere Platform — ICD-11, SNOMED CT, LOINC, CIEL, RxNorm, and CVX.

## Infrastructure (006-infrastructure/)

- [001-infrastructure-overview.md](006-infrastructure/001-infrastructure-overview.md): Enterprise infrastructure and zero-touch deployment mapping for the ZarishSphere ecosystem.
- [002-github-org-architecture.md](006-infrastructure/002-github-org-architecture.md): GitHub organisation architecture and configuration for the ZarishSphere Foundation.
- [003-cloudflare-architecture.md](006-infrastructure/003-cloudflare-architecture.md): Cloudflare edge routing, WAF, and nameserver architecture for the ZarishSphere ecosystem.
- [004-domain-architecture.md](006-infrastructure/004-domain-architecture.md): Domain hierarchy and internal routing subsystem for ZarishSphere.
- [005-email-architecture.md](006-infrastructure/005-email-architecture.md): Secure decentralised communication and relay infrastructure for ZarishSphere.
- [006-ci-cd-architecture.md](006-infrastructure/006-ci-cd-architecture.md): CI/CD orchestration layout via GitHub Actions for the ZarishSphere ecosystem.
- [007-security-architecture.md](006-infrastructure/007-security-architecture.md): Defense-in-depth security architecture for the ZarishSphere ecosystem — 7 security layers, secrets management, encryption strategy, and audit controls across all five deployment planes.
- [008-security-policies.md](006-infrastructure/008-security-policies.md): Security policies for the ZarishSphere ecosystem — access control, encryption standards, vulnerability disclosure, secret management, and operational security procedures.
- [009-compliance-controls.md](006-infrastructure/009-compliance-controls.md): Compliance controls for the ZarishSphere ecosystem — HIPAA technical safeguards, GDPR data subject rights, data residency policy, and a consolidated compliance control matrix.
- [010-threat-models.md](006-infrastructure/010-threat-models.md): Consolidated threat models for the ZarishSphere ecosystem — FHIR API layer, authentication layer, data layer, and mobile/offline layer.

## Technology stack (007-tech-stack/)

- [001-tech-stack-master.md](007-tech-stack/001-tech-stack-master.md): Master production tech stack mapping for the ZarishSphere ecosystem.
- [002-go-fhir-server.md](007-tech-stack/002-go-fhir-server.md): Go-native high-performance FHIR R5 server module specification.
- [003-frontend-stack.md](007-tech-stack/003-frontend-stack.md): UI component library layer specification using React 19, Next.
- [004-data-pipeline.md](007-tech-stack/004-data-pipeline.md): Analytical real-time data infrastructure pipeline specification.
- [005-no-code-tools.md](007-tech-stack/005-no-code-tools.md): Offline-capable extensibility layout via declarative low-code integration.
- [006-oss-tool-catalog.md](007-tech-stack/006-oss-tool-catalog.md): Complete open-source software tool catalog for the ZarishSphere ecosystem.

## Architecture Decision Records (008-adrs/)

- [001-adr-go-as-primary-language.md](008-adrs/001-adr-go-as-primary-language.md): ADR-001: Selection of Go as the primary engine language for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [002-adr-cloudflare-as-edge-platform.md](008-adrs/002-adr-cloudflare-as-edge-platform.md): ADR-002: Selection of Cloudflare as the edge platform for WAF, CDN, DNS, and global hosting for all ZarishSphere web properties.
- [003-adr-github-as-government.md](008-adrs/003-adr-github-as-government.md): ADR-003: GitOps and GitHub as the operational rule ownership and governance control plane for the ZarishSphere Foundation.
- [004-adr-no-hapi-fhir.md](008-adrs/004-adr-no-hapi-fhir.md): ADR-004: Rejection of Java HAPI FHIR and decision to build a Go-native FHIR server.
- [005-adr-fhir-r5-over-r4.md](008-adrs/005-adr-fhir-r5-over-r4.md): ADR-005: Enforcement of FHIR R5 as the canonical FHIR version for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [006-adr-zero-cost-toolchain.md](008-adrs/006-adr-zero-cost-toolchain.md): ADR-006: Structural requirement for open-source, zero-cost toolchain dependencies across the entire ZarishSphere ecosystem.
- [007-adr-markdown-first-documentation.md](008-adrs/007-adr-markdown-first-documentation.md): ADR-007: Plaintext markdown-first documentation architecture standard for all ZarishSphere documentation.
- [008-adr-apache-cc-dual-license.md](008-adrs/008-adr-apache-cc-dual-license.md): ADR-008: Dual-licensing rules for open-source modularity — Apache 2.
- [009-adr-no-vendor-lock-in.md](008-adrs/009-adr-no-vendor-lock-in.md): ADR-009: Decoupling the platform layer from cloud infrastructure provider specific dependencies.
- [010-adr-gui-first-ux.md](008-adrs/010-adr-gui-first-ux.md): ADR-010: High-fidelity UI/UX interactivity standards for field deployment.
- [011-adr-privacy-by-architecture.md](008-adrs/011-adr-privacy-by-architecture.md): ADR-011: All ZarishSphere platform data architectures enforce privacy at the infrastructure layer.
- [012-adr-no-single-person-dependency.md](008-adrs/012-adr-no-single-person-dependency.md): ADR-012: No feature, workflow, critical function, API key, credential, or operational process in the ZarishSphere ecosystem may depend on a single person's access, knowledge, or continued availability.
- [013-adr-postgresql-primary-database.md](008-adrs/013-adr-postgresql-primary-database.md): ADR-013: PostgreSQL 18.
- [014-adr-nats-jetstream-messaging.md](008-adrs/014-adr-nats-jetstream-messaging.md): ADR-014: NATS JetStream as the async messaging backbone for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [015-adr-valkey-for-caching.md](008-adrs/015-adr-valkey-for-caching.md): ADR-015: Valkey 9.
- [016-adr-opentofu-infrastructure-as-code.md](008-adrs/016-adr-opentofu-infrastructure-as-code.md): ADR-016: OpenTofu 1.
- [017-adr-argocd-gitops.md](008-adrs/017-adr-argocd-gitops.md): ADR-017: Argo CD 2.
- [018-adr-cilium-service-mesh.md](008-adrs/018-adr-cilium-service-mesh.md): ADR-018: Cilium 1.
- [019-adr-carbon-design-system.md](008-adrs/019-adr-carbon-design-system.md): ADR-019: IBM Carbon Design System 1.
- [020-adr-microfrontend-architecture.md](008-adrs/020-adr-microfrontend-architecture.md): ADR-020: Microfrontend architecture for the ZarishSphere Platform frontend using Vite 8.
- [021-adr-powersync-mobile-offline.md](008-adrs/021-adr-powersync-mobile-offline.md): ADR-021: PowerSync 1.
- [022-adr-typescript-strict-mode.md](008-adrs/022-adr-typescript-strict-mode.md): ADR-022: TypeScript 5.
- [023-adr-flutter-cross-platform-mobile.md](008-adrs/023-adr-flutter-cross-platform-mobile.md): ADR-023: Flutter 3.

## Standard Operating Procedures (009-operations/)

- [001-sop-new-document-creation.md](009-operations/001-sop-new-document-creation.md): SOP-001: How to provision and validate a new documentation node following ZUSS conventions.
- [002-sop-github-workflow.md](009-operations/002-sop-github-workflow.md): SOP-002: Repository branching, protecting, merging, and pull request models for ZarishSphere projects.
- [003-sop-contribution-process.md](009-operations/003-sop-contribution-process.md): SOP-003: Review pipeline and external patch merge processing.
- [004-sop-zuss-compliance-audit.md](009-operations/004-sop-zuss-compliance-audit.md): SOP-004: Systematic compliance and formatting audit checks.
- [005-sop-deployment-checklist.md](009-operations/005-sop-deployment-checklist.md): SOP-005: Automated documentation build and synchronisation production checklist.
- [006-sop-credential-succession.md](009-operations/006-sop-credential-succession.md): SOP-006: Establish procedures for documenting, rotating, and succeeding credentials, API keys, secrets, and access rights so that no ZarishSphere function depends on a single person's availability.
- [007-sop-audit-procedures.md](009-operations/007-sop-audit-procedures.md): SOP-007: Establish procedures for maintaining, reviewing, and verifying the audit trail of all ZarishSphere governance and platform decisions through git history, ADRs, and documentation.
- [008-credential-inventory.md](009-operations/008-credential-inventory.md): Central credential inventory for the ZarishSphere ecosystem.
- [009-sop-deployment.md](009-operations/009-sop-deployment.md): SOP-009: Deploy a new service version to the ZarishSphere Platform via GitOps with Argo CD.
- [010-sop-incident-response.md](009-operations/010-sop-incident-response.md): SOP-010: End-to-end incident response for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [011-sop-security-incident.md](009-operations/011-sop-security-incident.md): SOP-011: Security incident response playbook for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [012-sop-backup-dr.md](009-operations/012-sop-backup-dr.md): SOP-012: Database backup and disaster recovery procedures for the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [013-sop-country-onboarding.md](009-operations/013-sop-country-onboarding.md): SOP-013: Onboarding a new country to the ZarishSphere Platform.
- [014-sop-facility-onboarding.md](009-operations/014-sop-facility-onboarding.md): SOP-014: Onboarding a new health facility to an existing ZarishSphere country deployment.
- [015-sop-monitoring-dashboards.md](009-operations/015-sop-monitoring-dashboards.md): SOP-015: Monitoring and alerting via Grafana 12.

## Ecosystem components (010-ecosystem/)

- [001-console-spec.md](010-ecosystem/001-console-spec.md): Specification for the ZarishSphere Console — the browser-based management center for the entire ecosystem.
- [002-marketplace-spec.md](010-ecosystem/002-marketplace-spec.md): Specification for the ZarishSphere Marketplace — the discovery and deployment hub for all ecosystem components.
- [003-builder-spec.md](010-ecosystem/003-builder-spec.md): Specification for the ZarishSphere Builder — a GUI-based no-code creation tool for building forms, workflows, modules, and apps.
- [004-apps-spec.md](010-ecosystem/004-apps-spec.md): Specification for ZarishSphere Apps — pre-built, ready-to-use domain applications deployable immediately without configuration.
- [005-forms-spec.md](010-ecosystem/005-forms-spec.md): Specification for ZarishSphere Forms — a dynamic form engine that generates browser-based forms from ZARISH-STANDARDS definitions.
- [006-sdk-spec.md](010-ecosystem/006-sdk-spec.md): Specification for the ZarishSphere SDK — software development kits in Go, JavaScript, and Python for custom integration.
- [007-cli-spec.md](010-ecosystem/007-cli-spec.md): Specification for the ZarishSphere CLI — a command-line interface for terminal-based ecosystem management.
- [008-api-spec.md](010-ecosystem/008-api-spec.md): Specification for the ZarishSphere API — RESTful and GraphQL APIs for all ecosystem components.
- [009-services-spec.md](010-ecosystem/009-services-spec.md): Specification for ZarishSphere Services — the backend microservices powering the ecosystem: identity, audit, sync, notification, export, and integration.
- [010-modules-spec.md](010-ecosystem/010-modules-spec.md): Specification for ZarishSphere Modules — independently deployable domain packages covering health, education, logistics, and all 40+ domains.
- [011-distributions-spec.md](010-ecosystem/011-distributions-spec.md): Specification for ZarishSphere Distributions — pre-packaged, pre-configured, pre-tested deployment bundles for specific use cases.
- [012-engine-spec.md](010-ecosystem/012-engine-spec.md): Specification for the ZarishSphere Engine — the core runtime that executes G2A transformations, runs domain modules, renders forms, orchestrates workflows, synchronizes offline data, and generates reports.
- [013-system-spec.md](010-ecosystem/013-system-spec.md): Specification for the ZarishSphere System — the base operating environment providing IAM, encryption, configuration, monitoring, backup, and audit infrastructure.
- [014-content-forms-spec.md](010-ecosystem/014-content-forms-spec.md): Specification for zs-content-forms — the repository for domain-agnostic form definitions stored and versioned as FHIR R5 Questionnaire resources.
- [015-content-protocols-spec.md](010-ecosystem/015-content-protocols-spec.md): Specification for zs-content-protocols — the repository for machine-readable clinical and operational protocol definitions.
- [016-content-templates-spec.md](010-ecosystem/016-content-templates-spec.md): Specification for zs-content-templates — the repository for pre-configured deployment templates and distribution packages across all five planes.
- [017-content-reports-spec.md](010-ecosystem/017-content-reports-spec.md): Specification for zs-content-reports — the repository for report templates and dashboard configurations.
- [018-home-spec.md](010-ecosystem/018-home-spec.md): Specification for zs-home — the ZarishSphere Home public-facing landing page at zarishsphere.
- [019-fhir-hub-spec.md](010-ecosystem/019-fhir-hub-spec.md): Specification for zs-fhir-hub — the FHIR Integration Hub.

## Validation scripts

- [001-zuss-validate.sh](scripts/001-zuss-validate.sh): Naming, serialing, front matter, footers, banned words
- [002-pipeline-status.sh](scripts/002-pipeline-status.sh): Document completion status
- [003-resolve-cross-refs.sh](scripts/003-resolve-cross-refs.sh): Cross-reference validation
